message:
update(models): add claude-opus-4-7 to anthropic provider snapshot

Anthropic shipped claude-opus-4-7 (Opus 4.7) on 2026-04-28; surface it in
the bundled snapshot so /model autocomplete can suggest it without users
needing to wait for the next snapshot regeneration.

Mirrors the data in PR #59 (closed in favor of independent implementation
per project policy). Issue #60 lands in the same series and obsoletes
the need for one-line snapshot PRs going forward.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
